name: Mighty Dino King Rex
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>キング・レックス
desc: If this attacking card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: It can make a second attack during this Battle Phase. Once per turn, if you control this card that was not Summoned this turn: You can target up to 2 monsters your opponent controls; destroy them.
mnst_eff: If this attacking card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: It can make a second attack during this Battle Phase. Once per turn, if you control this card that was not Summoned this turn: You can target up to 2 monsters your opponent controls; destroy them.
eff: If this attacking card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: It can make a second attack during this Battle Phase. Once per turn, if you control this card that was not Summoned this turn: You can target up to 2 monsters your opponent controls; destroy them.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
